name: documents
description: Create and edit document artifacts in Nexts, including Word files and Google Docs.

interface.longDescription: Create, edit, inspect, render, verify, and export DOCX document artifacts locally. Use Documents when the durable output or target is a document, doc, docs, Word file, Google Doc, Google Docs document, memo, report, or writing artifact.
defaultPrompt: Draft a project memo as a document
Create a document from this outline
Write a polished doc for this plan
